arts.ttl: Nice CANCEL Rangers fans’ home end tickets as they issue warning to travelling supporters ahead of Europa League clash
arts.sum: Supporters will receive a full refund - but won't be able to see their side in action.

arts.ttl: Zak Lovelace suffers fresh Rangers setback as luckless starlet's injury curse strikes again
arts.sum: Head coach Malky Thomson said on Rangers TV: "Obviously Zak Lovelace had started the game and Archie was a wee bit disappointed not to start. Join Football Scotland's Rangers WhatsApp community!

arts.ttl: Frank Haise knows 'average' Rangers could give him another headache as Nice boss opens up on health scare
arts.sum: Haise was forced to attend hospital on Sunday after suffering a severe headache during his side's 2-1 Ligue 1 win over Strasbourg but insists he is back on the mend

arts.ttl: Nathan Patterson watches Rangers story repeat as Everton kickstart clearout with James Tavernier 'interest' named
arts.sum: The right-back has endured a miserable time at Goodison Park since leaving Ibrox

Nice head into this one unbeaten in their last five matches, though they are yet to pick up a victory in the Europa League this season. The French side have drawn two and lost two thus far, and will ...

arts.ttl: Joe Gelhardt 'wanted' by Rangers as Celtic loan transfer scuppered by red tape
arts.sum: Gers boss Philippe Clement wants to bolster his attacking options after watching his goal-shy side score just 17 times from 12 league games this season. Join Football Scotland's Rangers WhatsApp community!

arts.ttl: Nice vs Rangers predictions: Gers can expose injury-hit hosts
arts.sum: Nice take on Rangers at Stade de Nice in the Europa League on Thursday and Dan Childs fancies the away side to secure at least a share of the spoils.

arts.ttl: Derek McInnes endorsed to end Rangers 'rocky period' as Philippe Clement walks into Ibrox 'set up'
arts.sum: The Kilmarnock boss has already said no to Rangers

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd makes one thing absolutely clear about Rangers
arts.sum: "For anybody still speaking about a title race in Scotland, there is absolutely no chance, Rangers have got a fight on their hands with Aberdeen to finish second. Celtic are in a really good place and Aberdeen for me will fight it out with Rangers for second place."

arts.ttl: Rangers fans turn on their own as Hotline fury boils over with entitled flops handed firm Philippe Clement defence
arts.sum: Anthony Evans took your calls as Gers diehards clashed over their teams struggles
